n: Epilogue: The Waters of the Gilrain

steps.t: Roamingstar can be found in her glade in north-eastern Dor-en-Ernil. Erchar wishes to thank the Maiden of the Gilrain for watching over the people of …
The man Roamingstar pulled from the Gilrain can be found along the nearby banks. Roamingstar rescued a man from the waters of the Gilrain and healed h…
Roamingstar can be found in her glade in north-eastern Dor-en-Ernil. You have discovered Garvir sleeping along the river-banks, much to your surprise.…
Erchar can be found in Linhir in eastern Dor-en-Ernil. You have learned that Garvir was saved by the Maiden of the Gilrain as he fell into the river. …
Garvir can be found in Linhir. Garvir has returned to Linhir, much to his brothers' amazement. You should speak to him, and welcome him home.
